pub mod iwssim
pub enum Error

pub Error::DimensionMismatch::expected: usize
pub Error::DimensionMismatch::got: usize
pub Error::InvalidImageSize
pub Error::InvalidImageSize::height: u32
pub Error::InvalidImageSize::width: u32
pub Error::NoWarmReference
pub struct Iwssim
pub fn Iwssim::clear_warm_reference(&mut self)
pub fn Iwssim::dimensions(&self) -> (u32, u32)
pub fn Iwssim::has_reference(&self) -> bool
pub fn Iwssim::new(u32, u32) -> Result<Self>
pub fn Iwssim::score(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8]) -> Result<IwssimScore>
pub fn Iwssim::score_gray(&mut self, &[f32], &[f32]) -> Result<IwssimScore>
pub fn Iwssim::score_strip(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8], u32) -> Result<IwssimScore>
pub fn Iwssim::score_strip_gray(&mut self, &[f32], &[f32], u32) -> Result<IwssimScore>
pub fn Iwssim::score_with_warm_ref(&mut self, &[u8]) -> Result<IwssimScore>
pub fn Iwssim::score_with_warm_ref_gray(&mut self, &[f32]) -> Result<IwssimScore>
pub fn Iwssim::score_with_warm_ref_strip(&mut self, &[u8], u32) -> Result<IwssimScore>
pub fn Iwssim::score_with_warm_ref_strip_gray(&mut self, &[f32], u32) -> Result<IwssimScore>
pub fn Iwssim::warm_reference(&mut self, &[u8]) -> Result<()>
pub fn Iwssim::warm_reference_gray(&mut self, &[f32]) -> Result<()>
pub fn Iwssim::with_params(u32, u32, IwssimParams) -> Result<Self>
pub struct IwssimParams
pub IwssimParams::allow_small: bool
pub IwssimParams::bl_sz_x: u32
pub IwssimParams::bl_sz_y: u32
pub IwssimParams::iw_flag: bool
pub IwssimParams::parent: bool
pub IwssimParams::sigma_nsq: f32
pub const fn IwssimParams::allow_small(bool) -> Self
pub const fn IwssimParams::new() -> Self
pub struct IwssimScore
pub IwssimScore::per_scale: [f64; 5]
pub IwssimScore::score: f64
pub const IWSSIM_COLUMN_NAME: &str
pub const MIN_NATIVE_DIM: u32
pub const NUM_SCALES: usize
pub const STRIP_BODY_DEFAULT: u32
pub const STRIP_BODY_MIN: u32
pub const STRIP_HALO_ROWS: usize
pub fn rgb_u8_to_gray_bt601(&[u8], &mut [f32])

pub type Result<T> = core::result::Result<T, Error>
